heading: Word gets around
subheading: Real reviews from real neighbors — a five-table room earns its reputation one bowl at a time.

items.quote: The ramen base is traditional and made with real ingredients. Worth every drop. If you are near or even if it's out of your way, this spot is worth the trip.
items.author: Justin Countryman

items.quote: My Tonkotsu ramen was super flavorful and they absolutely did not skimp on the chashu, which melted in your mouth.
items.author: Angelo Carosio

items.quote: The Golden Spicy Ramen was amazing and we all tried it and it blew our minds.
items.author: Tacey Whittemore

items.quote: The sushi tasted so fresh, it's some of the best I've had in Kitsap.
items.author: Mikayla Liles

items.quote: Crab rangoons were perfectly crispy and actually tasted like crab.
items.author: Laura Gibeau

items.quote: This restaurant opened up only recently but I already feel like a long-time regular!!! 6/5 stars for me!
items.author: Christian Ko
